## Risk and escalation check

- [ ] Secrets or credentials touched
- [ ] Auth, permissions, or session handling touched
- [ ] Billing or payments touched
- [ ] Protected paths or production config touched
- [ ] Database migrations or destructive data changes touched
- [ ] Code ownership is unclear
- [ ] None of the above

If any item except "None of the above" is checked, add `hard-stop` and `needs-human`.
